evals.name: full-cycle-execution
evals.prompt: Run a full Ten-Step Cycle for a new feature task: 'Add user profile editing functionality'. Execute all phases A through D.
expectations: Should execute all Phase A steps (A.0, A.1, A.2, A.3)
Should execute Phase B steps (B.1, B.2)
Should execute Phase C steps (C.1, C.2)
Should execute Phase D steps (D.1, D.2)
Phases must execute in A→B→C→D order

evals.name: phase-skip-logic
evals.prompt: Run the workflow for a feature task but skip Phase A because state-scanner already confirmed project state is current and an OpenSpec already exists (state: A.3 completed).
expectations: Should detect that Phase A is already completed
Should skip Phase A and start from Phase B
Should start execution from Phase B.1
Should explain why Phase A was skipped
